findings.location: s1 — ウィンドウスコープ row (note)
findings.description: The source note for ウィンドウスコープ provides a concrete upper bound on page size: 2004–2005 era entry-model devices have a limit of approximately 20Kbyte–100Kbyte. The knowledge file summarizes the reasoning as 'ページサイズ上限の制約から' without including this specific figure. The number helps AI assistants gauge the severity of the constraint when advising users on how much data to store in window scope.
findings.source_evidence: (2004～2005ごろのエントリモデル端末では 20Kbyte～100Kbyte程度が上限)
